title: Seperate Groups and Columns permissions
excerpt:

posts.author: AdamCPU (Adam Raphael)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the ability to edit groups on a board is linked with the ability to edit columns as a “structure” permission.

I want to be able to give board members the ability to edit/duplicate groups without the ability to edit columns.

Please make these a seperate permission for boards (and even a permission for workspaces). Currently I have to make people board owners if they need to edit groups, which means almost everybody ends up as an owner.

A real overhaul of permissions would be great but my request is just a simple addition.
